recommendations.title: On Swift Horses
recommendations.overview: In the 1950s, a seemingly sensible newlywed and her wayward brother-in-law undertake parallel journeys of risk, romance, and self-discovery.

recommendations.title: Newness
recommendations.overview: In contemporary Los Angeles, two millennials navigating a social media–driven hookup culture begin a relationship that pushes both emotional and physical boundaries.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
recommendations.overview: After a crippling injury leaves her husband impotent, Lady Chatterly is torn between her love for her husband and her physical desires. With her husband's consent, she seeks out other means of fulfilling her needs.

recommendations.title: Brokeback Mountain
recommendations.overview: In 1960s Wyoming, two men develop a strong emotional and sexual relationship that endures as a lifelong connection complicating their lives as they get married and start families of their own.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley
recommendations.overview: After a crippling injury leaves her husband impotent, Lady Chatterly is torn between her love for her husband and her physical desires. With her husband's consent, she seeks out other means of fulfilling her needs.

recommendations.title: Robin Robin
recommendations.overview: A bird raised by mice begins to question where she belongs and sets off on a daring journey of self-discovery.

recommendations.title: Five Feet Apart
recommendations.overview: Seventeen-year-old Stella spends most of her time in the hospital as a cystic fibrosis patient. Her life is full of routines, boundaries and self-control — all of which get put to the test when she meets Will, an impossibly charming teen who has the

recommendations.title: Together Together
recommendations.overview: When young loner Anna is hired as the surrogate for Matt, a single man in his 40s, the two strangers come to realize this unexpected relationship will quickly challenge their perceptions of connection, boundaries and the particulars of love.

recommendations.title: Shottas
recommendations.overview: A raw urban drama about two friends raised on the dangerous streets of Kingston, Jamaica. Biggs and Wayne take on the "Shotta" way of life to survive. As young boys, they begin a life of crime, eventually moving to the US where they begin a ruthless
recommendations.director: Lyndale V. Pettus, Cess Silvera, Adam Doench

recommendations.title: Interview with the Vampire
recommendations.overview: A vampire relates his epic life story of love, betrayal, loneliness, and dark hunger to an over-curious reporter.
